title: Loki’s Past Deepens
description: On pages 11–13, this part follows Unknown person #10, Rocks D. Xebec, Unknown person #11, Usopp, Unknown person #12, Hajrudin as The story turns toward Elbaf’s past, Loki, Rocks, Harald, and the ancient grudges shaping the island’s present conflict.
scene: The story turns toward Elbaf’s past, Loki, Rocks, Harald, and the ancient grudges shaping the island’s present conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Several months after the rocks crew's takeover of Pirate Island...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Where the hell did ya come from?!

dialogue.speaker: Rocks D. Xebec
dialogue.text: I'm here to join the rocks pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Gyaha ha ha ha! Maybe in yer dreams, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It ain't gonna happen! You won't even lay eyes on 'em!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The rocks pirates're the ocean's all-stars of evil!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: See that fish-shaped boulder over there? That's where they're said to be holed up!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If yer dead set on meetin' 'em, head that way!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But the deeper into the island ya go, the Madder the bastards get!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Good luck with that death wish! Gyahaha!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: TAKE THAT!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Gyaha HA! That'll teach ya!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: UWAAH!! You're...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What's Shiki's rival doing here?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Kyo THE WICKED (future silver axe)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: GYAAAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Kyo the hitman!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The strong gathered around rocks, and their presence attracted even stronger recruits.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Stay back!! He'll kill ya!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What the?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What a view!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Look at the scenery!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Blasting a couple holes in the place was the right call after all.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Ain't that right?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As I was sayin', there's two devil fruits I'm after.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: One of 'em's Most likely on Elbaf.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It'll only show its true power if Harald eats it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: We'll need those galera folks too, yeah?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I've heard the legends, but...

dialogue.speaker: Hajrudin
dialogue.text: pirate Captain John

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm using all my contacts to try and track them down,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But there's nothin' about a frozen army of giants.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: PIRATE CHARLOTTE LINLIN (FUTURE BIG MOM)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if you find them, what good are a bunch of corpses now?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: PIRATE STREUSEN (UNLINE's partner-in-crime)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Exactly, there's no way to bring them back!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shut it!! We're talking about dreams!! Don't be a downer!!

summary: This part advances the Elbaf’s Buried History through 38 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
